name: Guess We'll Have Another Scrap. You Can Only Risk Death While You're Still Alive!!

issues.description: First effect should Rest a DON!! card before AttachDon. DSL is missing the Rest action as a prerequisite. Text says 'You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards' followed by conditional 'If..., add up to 1 DON!!'. The Rest action must occur first.

Condition is incomplete. Text requires both 'Leader is Gol.D.Roger' AND 'you have any DON!! cards given' (attached to leader). Current DSL only checks for leader name, missing the HasAttachedDon check.
AttachDon action is incorrect. Text says 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — this should SearchDeck (find from deck) then AttachDon and Rest, not just AttachDon alone.
